# ADR-001: Markdown Is the Canonical Format

## Status

Accepted

## Context

RAC needs one canonical source format that stays reviewable in any editor.

## Decision

Markdown is the canonical source format.

## Consequences

- Artifacts stay human-readable.
- Tooling parses one format.

## Related Roadmaps

- v0-portal-roadmap

## Related Requirements

- REQ-DOES-NOT-EXIST
